# דרכנו יחד משכנתאות — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A mortgage consulting business specializing exclusively in the Israeli government-subsidized housing program 'Mchir LaMishtaken' (Price for the Resident). The consultant helps lottery winners navigate the complex mortgage process specific to this program, offering expert guidance tailored to first-time homebuyers who won the right to purchase subsidized housing. The brand positions itself as a niche expert who deeply understands the unique financial and bureaucratic requirements of this specific program.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
זכיתם בהגרלת דירה בהנחה? אל תלכו לאיבוד בבירוקרטיה. צוות דרכנו יחד משכנתאות מלווה אתכם צעד-אחר-צעד בתהליך המשכנתא הייחודי של מחיר למשתכן, עם ייעוץ שחוסך לכם כסף וטעויות. דברו איתנו עוד היום.

### תודה שפניתם | דרכנו יחד משכנתאות
https://example.com/thank-you
דרכנו יחד משכנתאות - תודה שפניתם | דרכנו יחד משכנתאות

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About דרכנו יחד משכנתאות
A mortgage consulting business specializing exclusively in the Israeli government-subsidized housing program 'Mchir LaMishtaken' (Price for the Resident). The consultant helps lottery winners navigate the complex mortgage process specific to this program, offering expert guidance tailored to first-time homebuyers who won the right to purchase subsidized housing. The brand positions itself as a niche expert who deeply understands the unique financial and bureaucratic requirements of this specific program.

## Target Audience
- זוכי מחיר למשתכן
- רוכשי דירה ראשונה

## Industry
Mortgage Consulting

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
